Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 130 upvotes, 10 comments
  2. The Social Smolnet 54 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. Exploring 8 Shaft Weaving 24 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Drawvg Filter for FFmpeg 150 upvotes, 25 comments
  5. Drugwars for the TI-82/83/83 Calculators (2011) 237 upvotes, 69 comments
  6. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 614 upvotes, 202 comments
  7. Full Disclosure: A Third (and Fourth) Azure Sign-In Log Bypass Found 252 upvotes, 78 comments
  8. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 131 upvotes, 37 comments
  9. The Soul of a Pedicab Driver 103 upvotes, 30 comments
  10. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 92 upvotes, 28 comments
  11. Building a Reader for the Smallest Hard Drive 83 upvotes, 25 comments
  12. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 100 upvotes, 35 comments
  13. Super Micro Shares Plunge 25% After Co-Founder Charged in $2.5B Smuggling Plot 114 upvotes, 43 comments
  14. Parallel Perl – autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 29 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Just Put It on a Map 91 upvotes, 39 comments
  16. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 311 upvotes, 161 comments
  17. Regex Blaster 78 upvotes, 33 comments
  18. Chuck Norris has died 477 upvotes, 278 comments
  19. VisiCalc Reconstructed 61 upvotes, 27 comments
  20. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 130 upvotes, 68 comments
  21. HP realizes that mandatory 15-minute support call wait times isn't good support 214 upvotes, 132 comments
  22. Show HN: Sonar – A tiny CLI to see and kill whatever's running on localhost 85 upvotes, 47 comments
  23. 90% of crypto's Illinois primary spending failed to achieve its objective 28 upvotes, 12 comments
  24. Oregon school cell phone ban: 'Engaged students, joyful teachers' 166 upvotes, 118 comments
  25. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 1092 upvotes, 1150 comments
  26. Randomization in Controlled Experiments 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. MacBook M5 Pro and Qwen3.5 = Local AI Security System 32 upvotes, 30 comments
  28. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 77 upvotes, 96 comments
  29. Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility 8 upvotes, 5 comments
  30. Having Kids (2019) 85 upvotes, 131 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 21 March 2026. Source here.
